author: doll-agent
content: Add Poly::integ_with_bounds as a trait default working for all 6 bases. Per step: integrate-with-zero-constant, divide by scl, probe eval(lbnd), set coeffs[0] += target - probe_value via from_coeffs + with_mapping. Works because all 6 bases have basis_0 ≡ 1, so adding to coeffs[0] uniformly shifts eval. 4 Chebyshev tests cover default-args parity, lbnd shift, scl divider, zero-scl error.
